feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Please Don’t Go
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,080Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: After a brutal fight pushes Eddie to the edge of walking away, Buck finally calls out the fear hiding underneath all of Eddie’s walls: loving someone means losing them. As old wounds and unspoken feelings crack open in the middle of a stormy night, Buck and Eddie are forced to confront the truth about what they are to each other—and whether they can survive it. -- Inspired by a song by Jack Avery called PLEASE DON’T GO

entry.title: The Space Between The Stars
entry.summary:
Author: Teaghan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,519Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: He looked around the table and his gaze landed on a brunette boy with stunning brown eyes. The boy smiled at Buck when he realised he was getting looked at and Buck immediately looks down at his plate in the embarrasment of getting caught. Or Buck is a transfer student at Hogwarts and almost instantly falls head over heels for Eddie, who also happens to be an amazing quidditch player.

entry.summary:

entry.title: It Happened in the Kitchen
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,951Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 7

Summary: Buck and Eddie find themselves home alone a month after Eddie comes out and tension has built to a boiling point.   This is a deleted scene from my fic 'Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly' following chapter 15.

entry.title: Stay
entry.summary:
Author: Second_starr

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,031Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 76

Summary: “They said I’ve been approved to adopt Theo.” the words coming out broken. Eddie doesn’t speak immediately. Doesn’t rush in. Just waits. Buck hates how easily Eddie reads him. He’s got better at it since Theo. This should be good news. It is good news. Theo is safe. Theo is thriving. His nightmares are less frequent now. He laughs easily again. He calls for Buck when he gets hurt. Climbs into Buck’s bed during thunderstorms. And Buck wants him. God, he wants him. That’s the terrifying part. Or The aftermath of Buck being told he is able to adopt Theo officially. Eddie is there to put the pieces back together.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Cheating chronicles
entry.summary:
Author: 5bigbooms

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 856Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 3

Summary: 'MY BROTHER??' Screamed Ryan. 'YOU PEGGED MY FUCKING BROTHER SAMANTHA??' 'Im so sorry Ryan, Im so so sorry, he was just so good...' 'You are so unfucking believable. Even Blue, he went along with it? First he steals my dad, now my wife. What. The. Hell! What next my dog?' '... About that...' 'He took the dog?!' 'NOnononono. We fucked the dog' 'WHAT-'

entry.title: I say I'm straight but I'm actually gay
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,098Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 34

Summary: Eddie Diaz has spent most of his life trying to be the person everyone expected him to be: son, husband, father, soldier, medic, firefighter. Straight. Then one late-night song lyric cracks something open, and suddenly all the feelings he’s spent years ignoring about Evan Buckley become impossible to deny. Meanwhile, Buck has been hopelessly in love with Eddie for longer than either of them realizes. -- Inspired by a song by Wilmah called Everything In The World

entry.title: The waves hide the secrets
entry.summary:
Author: Thunderbirdsfirestar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,901Chapters: 7/30Kudos: 160

Summary: Blythe and Don hart had two children Evan and Ryan hart. When Ryan was born they were in Pennsylvania for 2 weeks and Evan hart was taken after his younger brother was born. 33 years later the truth comes out when Chris get his dad and buck to do a d.n.a test.

entry.title: Aftershock
entry.summary:
Author: justherefortheplot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,466Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 8

Summary: When Evan Buckley is struck by lightning during a rescue, the 118 prepare for the worst. Damon Salvatore refuses to let his friend die. Now Buck is waking up with heightened senses, impossible hunger, and the horrifying realization that death was only the beginning. As witches hide secrets, hunters sharpen stakes, and Los Angeles somehow becomes tangled in the Mystic Falls' supernatural world of chaos, Buck finds himself caught between the life he had and the monster he is becoming. And Damon may have just destroyed them both trying to save him.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Your Heart’s a Bird Without the Wings to Fly
entry.summary:
Author: catniss_37

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,294Chapters: 16/20Kudos: 139

Summary: "Buck!" Eddies voice rang through the space, abruptly cut off by the deafening sound of crumpling concrete hitting the ground. Eddie stared at the rubble now blocking the way between himself and Buck. "Buck," Eddie whimpered as he dropped to his knees in front of the pile of rubble Buck was buried under. OR If episode 9x3 actually included the subway collapse from the promo, because I'm so mad about that.Continuing the story using that as a plot point. It will be canon divergent from that point onward in season 9, episode 3.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 126,717Chapters: 33/?Kudos: 87

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: allow the ground to find its brutal way to me
entry.summary:
Author: Daisies_and_Briars

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,215Chapters: 5/7Kudos: 219

Summary: When Bobby reacts poorly to the news of Buck and Eddie's very new relationship, Buck doesn't understand. Convinced Bobby is paranoid he is about to die, Buck finds himself at the center of a personal mystery the origins of which he cannot remember.

entry.title: You should be alone with me
entry.summary:
Author: dizzyizzydee

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,128Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 58

Summary: "Buck is being a bitch. That’s the only way Eddie can word how he feels. Every time he thinks it he feels like a 13 year old girl. It was the type of thing his little sisters would say when they had a falling out with their insanely intense friend groups. He’d ask what was wrong and the only words they’d be able to articulate were “Olivia’s being a bitch” or something like that. Now that was him. A grown man, a father, looking at Hen who was kindly asking what was wrong as he sulked in the corner of the station loft and as he stares at her the only words going through his head are Buck is being a bitch. He’s being bitchy." Eddie is feeling dejected and crazy. Buck is pulling away but nothing happened that Eddie can pinpoint. They're still best friends, so why is he feeling so upset? On the other hand Buck is desperately trying to shove his own feelings away. Fixated on getting over Eddie so they can get back to 'normal' Buck unwittingly sends their entire friendship into a freefall.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Of Kidnappings, Cherry Red Suckers, Apocalypse Apologies, & a Giant Bag Full of....
entry.summary:
Author: Firefawn

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,967Chapters: 6/14Kudos: 1,009

Summary: If Buck thought the aftermath of the lawsuit was bad, it had nothing – absolutely nothing – on the Winchesters barreling into his life, finding out the apocalypse was imminent, that his own death was a seal, and a demon hitting on him. He really should have realized that when an angel shows up to stop you from throwing yourself off a bridge, that it isn’t always a good thing.----After the lawsuit, Buck is back at work, hoping to reconcile. Only...it doesn't go as planned. His family hates him and after a lifetime of rejection it's one hit too many. Buck plans his goodbye…only a certain angel stops him, 'borrows' him, hands him the Winchester-patented starter's guide to hunting manual, and gives him purpose again. Too bad that angel was so busy saving Buck, they forgot about the goodbye letters left in the loft.---Buck rubbed at the bridge of his nose tiredly. "I'm pretty sure this is kidnapping." Dean scoffed. Sam shot him a look. "Think of it as adult babysitting." Gabriel waggled a bottle of top shelf bourbon from his perch on the TV stand. "With booze!" Right. Buck eyed his new...friend, warily. "Okay, kidnapping adjacent."

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
